scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet greets the delegation from Taif
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet extending his hand for a handshake
scene_input.setting: A desert landscape with palm trees

schema_output.scene_summary: The Prophet greets the delegation from Taif
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 365
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of hospitality and welcoming others

characters.name: Suwayd ibn al- Ḥārith
characters.appearance: slender build, slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a light brown thobe and a white head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad welcomes the delegation from Taif with a warm and open heart, extending his hand for a handshake as a sign of friendship and respect.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene desert landscape with a cluster of palm trees swaying gently in the breeze. The sun shines brightly in the afternoon sky, casting a warm golden light across the scene. In the distance, a small group of men, dressed in simple yet dignified clothing, approach the central figure standing alone. The central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, his right hand extended in a gentle gesture of greeting. One of the approaching men, Suwayd ibn al- Ḥārith, a slender older man with slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a light brown thobe and a white head covering, takes a step forward, looking at the central figure with a mix of curiosity and respect. Soft warm golden light, peaceful and serene mood. Medium shot from a slight angle, capturing the warmth of the desert landscape and the gentle gesture of the central figure. Warm beige, sandy, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
